name: Romantic Getaway in Phu Quoc: 5 Days of Love & Paradise
duration: Places:Ho Chi Minh City - Saigon River - Phu Quoc
highlights: Toast to your love with champagne or cocktails on a romantic sunset cruise around the Saigon River.
Relax and unwind on Phu Quoc's pristine beaches, where powdery white sands meet crystal-clear waters.
Spend leisurely days lounging under the sun and taking private walks along the shoreline hand in hand.

itinerary.title: Ho Chi Minh City Arrival - Intimate Dinner Cruise on the Saigon River
itinerary.description:
Afternoon

Upon your arrival, BestPrice Travel's tour guide and driver will pick you up from Tan Son Nhat International Airport and transfer you to your hotel in Ho Chi Minh City. Evening

18:00 - 18:30: our friendly drivers will pick you up and take you to the port for a romantic cruise along the Saigon River. Take a leisurely cruise and enjoy the serene sunset. Admire the breathtaking sights of the city at night, with its shimmering boulevard, modern urban complexes, and elegant bridges. Marvel at the spectacular view of Ho Chi Minh City's skyline and the bustling river life
itinerary.accommodation: Hotel in Ho Chi Minh city

itinerary.title: Flight to Phu Quoc - Romantic Dinner
itinerary.description:
Morning 

Enjoy breakfast and some personal time at your hotel before the driver picks you up and takes you to the airport to catch your flight to Phu Quoc - an enchanting island where turquoise waters, white sandy beaches, and tropical bliss await you. Upon your arrival at Phu Quoc Airport, our driver will take you to the hotel to check-in. Spend your time with your partner relaxing on the pristine beaches of Phu Quoc or discovering the surroundings. Evening

Enjoy a special romantic dinner with your beloved at your exquisite hotel, savoring a delectable feast of fresh seafood and tantalizing...

itinerary.title: Depart from Ho Chi Minh City - Cherished Memories Together
itinerary.description: Enjoy your breakfast with your partner at the hotel, and you will have some spare time to enjoy the last moment in the beautiful city of Phu Quoc before your departure. Our driver will pick you up from the hotel lobby and drive you to the airport to catch the flight to Ho Chi Minh City. NOTE: The check-out time is at 12:00. Please inform your travel consultant if you want a late checkout.

included: Overnight in shared Twin/ Double room with Air-condition (AC) at hotel.
All transport during tour on air - conditioned vehicle as per itinerary (including airport pick up & see off)
All in-tour stationed local English speaking guide.
Meals as indicated in the program
2 domestic flights Ho Chi Minh city - Phu Quoc and Phu Quoc - Ho Chi Minh city
